title: Super Bone Meal
description: Super Bonemeal expands your gardening power to a massive 50x50 area, allowing you to transform landscapes in a single click.
body:
I was terraforming my survival world but then I wanted foliage in a very large area and noticed the vanila bonemeal was puny so I made this.

When right-clicked, the tool applies a massive bone meal effect to a 50x50 area around the player, For arborists, the tool includes a precision growth mechanic that brute-forces saplings, bamboo, and sugar cane to reach their final growth stage immediately.

Craft with 9 bone blocks.
